name: session-07
title: Treasury Stock x Public BTC Tape

entries.text: CPI index level is 330.213 after 326.785 in February, a 1.05% monthly step-up in the index itself. Inflation data is still rising faster than the all-clear macro story would like.

Of the $38.979T federal debt stack, $31.317T sits in public hands and $7.662T stays inside government accounts. Because the market-held share is so dominant, that is still the part of the debt book that matters most for financing pressure.

$38.979T in total public debt is about $13.5B lower than the prior day's $38.993T reading. That downtick does not change the long-run supply story, but it does show the stock is still moving in discrete steps rather than one-way acceleration.

Coinbase still has BTC around $77,696 while Kraken and CryptoCompare are only a few dozen dollars away, and that kind of narrow venue spread is its own signal. The public spot surface is behaving like a coordinated range, not a fractured tape, which keeps the session grounded in execution quality instead of abstract crypto sentiment.
